raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 5,
    "R1.7": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The agent output maps against the nearest works (Clark et al., 2021, Brown et al., 2020) and identifies sharp deltas between them.",
    "R1.7": "The agent flags missing key works with bibliographic precision (e.g., newer meta-analyses for BLEU/ROUGE point).",
    "RX.1": "For each recommendation, the agent marks confidence and missing evidence (e.g., uncertainty about model version, limitations of calibration examples).",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d), with no drift or scope creep.",
    "RX.4": "No regressions; the agent identifies harmful patterns in the original (e.g., overclaimed conclusions, anachronism).",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason (e.g., rewritten text, added rationales)."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.95,
    "RX.1": 0.85,
    "RX.3": 0.98,
    "RX.4": 0.92,
    "RX.5": 0.88
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The agent output maps against the nearest works (Clark et al., 2021, Brown et al., 2020) and identifies sharp deltas between them.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flags missing key works with bibliographic precision (e.g., newer meta-analyses for BLEU/ROUGE point).
rationale.RX.1: For each recommendation, the agent marks confidence and missing evidence (e.g., uncertainty about model version, limitations of calibration examples).
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d), with no drift or scope creep.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; the agent identifies harmful patterns in the original (e.g., overclaimed conclusions, anachronism).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason (e.g., rewritten text, added rationales).
